creator: charlesn@iapc.net
text:
Environment: HP BL30P SERVER w/ Qlogic ISP 2312 PCI FC-AL Adapter, MSA 1000 FC Attached Storage, 
   HP Brocade Fiber Channel Switch.  9 Virtual Disk Configured. (LUNS 1-9)

I cannot install on LUNS 8 or 9 although LUNS 1-7 install fine.  No indication that LUNS exist during boot
except LUN 0 (The controller).

Can Install Windows on LUNS 8 or 9. :-(

Fix: 

None.
How-To-Repeat: Configure the above environment and try to install FreeBSD 7.1.
